# Web Route Contract: Book Detail Page

**Branch**: `005-book-detail-view` | **Generated by**: `/speckit-plan` | **Date**: 2026-05-25

## Route: GET /livre/{slug}

**Controller**: `App\Controller\BookController::show`
**Route name**: `app_book_show`
**Template**: `templates/livre/show.html.twig`

### Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Constraints |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| `slug` | `string` | Yes | Alphanumeric + hyphens; matched against `Book.slug` unique index |

### Access Rules

| Actor | Book status | Response |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| Anyone (anonymous or authenticated) | `PUBLISHED` | 200 OK — full book detail page |
| Anyone without `ROLE_MODERATOR` | `PENDING` | 404 Not Found |
| Anyone without `ROLE_MODERATOR` | `REJECTED` | 404 Not Found |
| `ROLE_MODERATOR` or `ROLE_ADMIN` | `PENDING` | 200 OK — full book detail page |
| `ROLE_MODERATOR` or `ROLE_ADMIN` | `REJECTED` | 200 OK — full book detail page |
| Anyone | (slug not found) | 404 Not Found |

**Note**: The `access_control` entry for `/livre/` is `PUBLIC_ACCESS`. Visibility enforcement is in `BookAccessChecker::assertViewable()`.

### Response 200 — Book Detail Page

**Content-Type**: `text/html; charset=UTF-8`

**Template variables** passed to Twig:

| Variable | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `book` | `App\Entity\Book` | Fully loaded book with relations |
| `taverneUrl` | `string` | Value of `TAVERNE_URL` env var |

**Page sections** (from `design/pages/livre.html`):

1. **Header** (`<h1>` area)
   - Volume eyebrow: `{saga} — tome {volumeNumber}` (hidden if both null)
   - French title: `book.title`
   - Original title: `book.originalTitle` (hidden if null)
   - Authors byline: inline comma-separated `author.firstName author.lastName`

2. **Cover + Gallery** (sticky left column)
   - `<img>` with `book.coverImage` path; placeholder SVG if null (alt = `book.title`)
   - Gallery tabs: rendered only for tabs that have a `BookImage`; "Tome" tab always shown (placeholder SVG if no images at all)
   - Tab ARIA: `role="tablist"` on container, `role="tab"` on each button, `role="tabpanel"` on image area
   - Keyboard navigation: arrow keys to switch tabs (Stimulus controller `gallery`)

3. **Action Bar** (authenticated users only — `{% if app.user %}`)
   - 4 buttons: "Ma Collection", "À lire", "À acheter", "Favori"
   - Styled per design system; no `onclick` handlers (placeholder for spec 006)

4. **Résumé du Grimoire**
   - Section hidden if `book.summary` is null or empty string

5. **Fiche Technique** (12-row table, FR-005 order)
   - Each row hidden if value is null / empty array
   - Row 3 (Saga/Volume): hidden if both `saga` and `volumeNumber` are null
   - Row 12 (Langues): hidden if `languages` is `[]`

6. **Taverne Link** (FR-008)
   - `<a href="{{ taverneUrl }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">`
   - Always rendered on published book pages

7. **SEO** (FR-016 — in `{% block meta %}`)
   - `<title>{{ book.title }} — La Collection des Aventuriers</title>`
   - `<meta name="description" content="{{ book.summary|u.truncate(160, '…')|default('') }}">`
   - `<meta property="og:title" content="{{ book.title }}">`
   - `<meta property="og:image" content="{{ ogImageUrl }}">`
     - `ogImageUrl` = absolute URL to `coverImage` if set, else absolute URL to placeholder SVG

### Response 404

Standard Symfony 404 page. No custom template required for this spec.

---

## Environment Variable

| Variable | Usage | Example |
|----------|-------|---------|
| `TAVERNE_URL` | Injected into `BookController` via `#[Autowire(env: 'TAVERNE_URL')]` or as Twig global parameter | `https://taverne.example.com` |

Must be documented in `.env` with a placeholder value:
```
TAVERNE_URL=https://taverne-des-aventuriers.example.com
```
